query: SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(topics, '$[*].category') as categories FROM editions ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44kpFRaAWYTEGd2.f72aef3c6a6b --database dCo7VYd4xNQxWrSX6SQCEW --execute SELECT id, JSON_EXTRACT(topics, '$[*].category') as categories FROM editions ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
